name: nullify
description: A powerful MV3 Chrome ad blocker with uBlock Origin-level features

scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:sample-rules && npm run build:ext
scripts.setup:prod: npm install && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:rules && npm run build:ext
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:rules && npm run build:ext
scripts.dev: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:sample-rules && webpack --mode development --watch
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist/ && find rules/ -name '*.json' ! -name 'system-unbreak.json' -delete && rm -rf _metadata && rm -rf rules/skipped
scripts.version:bump: f() { new_ver=$(npm version --no-git-tag-version "$1") && npm run version:sync -- "${new_ver#v}" && git add package.json package-lock.json manifest.json && git commit -m "Chore: bump version to ${new_ver#v}"; }; f
scripts.version:tag: f() { git tag -a "$1" -m "Nullify $1" && echo "Tag $1 created on $(git rev-parse HEAD)"; }; f
